calendar.matters:
MOTION TO TAX COSTS
Off Calendar Mar-03-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT DONG FU'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS is adopted as follows:

Defendant Dong Xing Fu's motion to tax costs and sanction Mark Lapham for contempt of order of December 12, 2019 is denied. The portion of the motion seeking to tax costs is moot because the memorandum of costs (exhibit A to Tony Fu's declaration filed with the motion papers) has not been filed. Per applicable case law, because there is a "fair ground of doubt" as to whether Mr. Lapham acted contemptuously, the portion of the motion seeking to hold Mr. Lapham in contempt is denied. The court credits Mr. Lapham's statements that he never received service of and was unaware of the motion papers leading to the December 12 order until after the order was issued.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the findings stated above.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order Entered On December 12, 2019
Off Calendar Mar-03-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling on ASSIGNEE LEGAL RECOVERY, LLC'S Motion To Set Aside Order Entered On December 12, 2019 is adopted as follows:

Judgment assignee Legal Recovery, LLC's motion to set aside the order entered on December 12, 2019 is granted in part. The court will issue an order superseding the December 12, 2019 order restating all portions of the order except that no opposition was filed and adding the words "against Mr. Fu" on line 10 of the order after the words "entered in this case". While the court credits Mr. Lapham's statements that he never received service of and was unaware of the motion papers leading to the December 12 order until after the order was issued, Legal Recovery has not argued, much less shown, that it should be allowed to enforce the January 14, 2015 judgment against Mr. Fu.

Counsel for Mr. Fu submitted a proposed order for the Court's consideration.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sanction Demas Yan, Tina Yan, And Mark Lapham And To Set Aside And Void (1)Judgment Of January 14, 2015 And (2) Acknowledgment Of Assignment Of Judgment Of August 5, 2019 And To Deem Or Declare Demas Yan And Tina Yan To Be Alter Ego Of Legal Recovery, Llc
Off Calendar Dec-12-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dong Xing Fu, 415-830-9929 Defendant in Pro Per.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DONG FU's Motion To Sanction Demas Yan, Tina Yan, And Mark Lapham And To Set Aside And Void (1)Judgment Of January 14, 2015 And (2) Acknowledgment Of Assignment Of Judgment Of August 5, 2019 And To Deem Or Declare Demas Yan And Tina Yan To Be Alter Ego Of Legal Recovery, Llc.

Defendant Dong Xing Fu's motion to sanction Demas Yan, Tina Yan and Mark Lapham, to set aside the judgment of January 14, 2015 and the assignment of that judgment, and to declare Demas Yan and Tina Yan to be the alter ego of Legal Recovery, LLC is granted in part. No opposition filed. Absent an order of the Bankruptcy Court or this court, neither Golden State Lumber, Inc. nor Legal Recovery, LLC may take any steps to enforce the judgment of January 14, 2015 entered in this case. Mr. Fu has shown that the judgment has been discharged by the Bankruptcy Court. Because Demas Yan and Tina Yan are not parties to this case, this court lacks jurisdiction to issue any orders against them in this case. While Mr. Lapham filed a notice of assignment of the judgment, there has been insufficient showing that his doing warrants sanctions by this court. There is no need to set aside the judgment or the assignment.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/HEK)
